mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, description, level, sequence_order, created_at FROM grammar_library_topics ORDER BY sequence_order
SELECT id, code, name, description, level, sequence_order, created_at FROM grammar_library_topics WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, code, name, description, level, sequence_order, created_at FROM grammar_library_topics WHERE sequence_order = #{sequenceOrder}
